sqls.name: customer_orders_view
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW customer_orders_view AS SELECT blinkit_customers.customer_id, blinkit_customers.customer_segment, blinkit_orders.order_id FROM blinkit_customers JOIN blinkit_orders ON blinkit_customers.customer_id = blinkit_orders.customer_id

sqls.name: order_items_view
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW order_items_view AS SELECT blinkit_order_items.product_id, blinkit_order_items.order_id FROM blinkit_order_items JOIN blinkit_orders ON blinkit_order_items.order_id = blinkit_orders.order_id

sqls.name: category_orders_view
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW category_orders_view AS SELECT blinkit_products.category, ORDER_ID FROM blinkit_products JOIN blinkit_order_items ON blinkit_products.product_id = blinkit_order_items.product_id
